meta.label: 旅行英语 B1
meta.description: 旅行场景常用句，涵盖机场、酒店、餐厅、问路等

lessons.title: 机场与飞行
lessons.description: 值机、安检、登机和飞行中的用语

sentences.text: I would like to check in for my flight to London.
sentences.translation: 我想办理飞往伦敦的航班值机。

sentences.text: Could you tell me where the baggage claim area is?
sentences.translation: 请问行李领取处在哪里？

sentences.text: My flight has been delayed for two hours.
sentences.translation: 我的航班延误了两小时。

sentences.text: Please have your passport and boarding pass ready.
sentences.translation: 请准备好您的护照和登机牌。

sentences.text: Is there a shuttle bus from the airport to the city center?
sentences.translation: 从机场到市中心有班车吗？

sentences.text: I need to change my seat to an aisle seat if possible.
sentences.translation: 如果可以的话，我想把座位换成靠过道的。

lessons.title: 酒店入住
lessons.description: 预订、入住、退房和客房服务

sentences.text: I have a reservation under the name of Smith.
sentences.translation: 我用 Smith 的名字预订了房间。

sentences.text: Could you please send some extra towels to my room?
sentences.translation: 能给我的房间送几条额外的毛巾吗？

sentences.text: What time is breakfast served in the morning?
I would like to check out and pay my bill.
The air conditioner in my room is not working properly.
sentences.translation: 我房间的空调不能正常工作了。

sentences.text: Is there free Wi-Fi available in the hotel?
sentences.translation: 酒店里有免费 Wi-Fi 吗？

lessons.title: 餐厅与点餐
lessons.description: 预订餐桌、点餐、结账的表达

sentences.text: I would like to book a table for four people tonight.
Could we see the menu please?
sentences.translation: 能给我们看一下菜单吗？

sentences.text: I would like to order the grilled salmon with vegetables.
sentences.translation: 我想点烤三文鱼配蔬菜。

sentences.text: Could you bring us the bill when you have a moment?
sentences.translation: 方便的时候能给我们账单吗？

sentences.text: This dish is absolutely delicious and beautifully presented.
sentences.translation: 这道菜非常美味而且摆盘精美。

sentences.text: I have a food allergy so please avoid any nuts.
sentences.translation: 我有食物过敏，请避免任何坚果。
